# Tinderbox

A Tinderbox is a small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually dry cloth soaked in light oil) used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a [[candle]], [[lamp]], [[hooded_lantern]], or [[torch]]-or anything else with exposed fuel-takes a [[bonus_action Action]]. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.
